# Avian-influenza readiness site record

Use this template for calm documentation only. Follow official Australian Government advice and authority directions.

## Contact

CARSI point of contact: Ivi Sims, 1300 654 684, https://www.linkedin.com/in/ivi-sims-4940b833/

## Site record fields

- Date and time
- Site address
- Client contact
- Observations
- Official reporting pathway used
- Personnel present
- PPE selected
- Photos taken
- Work completed
- Work excluded from scope
- Product labels and SDS checked
- Client communication notes

## Claim boundary

Do not state or imply that a site is disease-free. Do not state that a product, machine or method is required by government unless written authority direction and product evidence supports that statement.
